# Neverwinter Character Builder Web

A browser-based Neverwinter character builder and combat-stat calculator converted from the NW Char Builder Excel workbook.

## Primary use cases

- Build Neverwinter DPS characters.
- Calculate DPS ratings and estimated damage.
- Review MSOD DPS values.
- Calculate healer statistics.
- Calculate tank and defensive statistics.
- Apply self buffs, team buffs, class toggles, race toggles, gear bonuses, and miscellaneous values.
- Inspect original workbook formulas.
- Export and import builds as JSON.

## Main calculator templates

- DPS Template
- MSOD DPS Template
- HEAL Template
- TANK Template

## Technical summary

- Static HTML, CSS, and JavaScript application.
- No required backend or account.
- Workbook data and formulas are represented in generated JavaScript files.
- Formula verification is available through `npm test`.
- Static build generation is available through `npm run build`.

## Repository

https://github.com/Nischhalsubba/neverwinter-character-builder-web

## Accuracy note

Neverwinter balance values change between patches. Formula constants and game values should be verified before competitive or public use.

## Disclaimer

This is an independent community project and is not affiliated with or endorsed by Cryptic Studios, Arc Games, Gearbox Publishing, or the Neverwinter rights holders.
